items.title: LinkedIn
items.subtitle: Professional Network
items.description: Connect with me professionally. Follow my career journey, project updates, and industry insights. Open to collaboration and networking opportunities.

items.title: GitHub

items.title: Medium

items.description: Read my technical articles on system design, engineering patterns, and software architecture. I write about real-world implementation challenges and solutions.

items.title: Email

items.description: For professional inquiries, collaboration opportunities, or just to say hi. I respond to all genuine messages within 24 hours.
